## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates and next steps for the upcoming workshop, product announcements, and website roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Workshop date tentatively moved to mid-September, pending confirmation from partners](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

  - [Coca-Cola announcement for voice agent API preview expected mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Enterprise AI offering announcement planned for Q3](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Multiple other major announcements lined up for Q3/Q4 (voice API GA, speech model update, expressive TTS)](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Website homepage refresh dependent on voice API GA timing](https://fathom.video/share/6zyQ_zBUz5pbwNqnpYn1KX9usCaNMxcc?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
